name: crit
description: Review code changes, PRs, commit ranges, and plans with Crit inline comments.

interface.shortDescription: Inline code and plan review for Codex
interface.longDescription: Crit opens a local browser review UI for current code changes, explicit files, PRs, commit ranges, and proposed plans, then returns structured review comments to Codex.
defaultPrompt: Use $crit to review my current code changes.
